title: Comprehensive Performance Audit for DataTools Pro
description:
Conduct a comprehensive performance audit to identify and resolve slow page loading issues. Areas to investigate:

- **PostHog** — Check if the analytics script is causing slowdowns
- **Long-running queries** — Identify and optimize slow database queries
- **Cartesian products** — Find unintended cross joins
- **Loops** — Check for N+1 queries and inefficient loops
- **Code scan** — Identify performance gaps in application code
- **JS profiling** — Find hanging or slow-running JavaScript
acceptance_criteria: PostHog impact on page load assessed
N+1 query patterns identified and resolved
JavaScript profiling completed with findings documented
ux_changes: Faster page load times after performance optimizations.
middleware_changes: Query optimization, N+1 resolution, and code performance improvements.
